tool_definitions.name: memory_recall
tool_definitions.description: Recall persisted memories for session start. Scans the memory directory, scores by salience, selects within token budget, and returns formatted memories.

steps.message: MCP transport: connecting
MCP transport: connected
Use the memory_recall tool to recall all persisted memories for session start. Report what memories were found, how many were selected, and whether the recall was truncated or degraded.
